Class HoldBase

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.entities.HoldBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
HoldCashaccountBalance, HoldCashaccountDeposit, HoldSecurityaccountSecurity
@MappedSuperclass public abstract class HoldBase extends Object
In this time series analysis, the two dates represent a period with from and to. A new period is added to the previous one with the date minus 1 day. Such periods can be analyzed efficiently using SQL queries. The start date of a period will be part of a key in the derived class.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected Integer
    idPortfolio
    The evaluation can be carried out both at portfolio level and for all portfolios for a tenant.
    protected Integer
    idTenant
     
    protected LocalDate
    toHoldDate
    The end date of the time period or null if the time period is still open.
    protected LocalDateTime
    validTimestamp
    With these time stamps it is possible to validate that a data record is up to date.

  • Field Details

    • idTenant

      protected Integer idTenant

    • idPortfolio

      protected Integer idPortfolio
      The evaluation can be carried out both at portfolio level and for all portfolios for a tenant.

    • toHoldDate

      protected LocalDate toHoldDate
      The end date of the time period or null if the time period is still open.

    • validTimestamp

      protected LocalDateTime validTimestamp
      With these time stamps it is possible to validate that a data record is up to date. There may be a dependency on historical price data, so the up-to-dateness can be verified with a date comparison.
